books.title: Prisoners of Geography: Ten Maps That Explain Everything About the World
books.author: Tim Marshall
books.rationale: A fascinating look at several regions of the world and how geography, history, and politics are all interconnected.

books.title: Five Months on the Missouri River: Paddling a Dugout Canoe
books.author: Thomas Elpel
books.rationale: You are on the river with Thomas and crew as they explore the Missouri from source to St. Louis in the reverse footsteps of Lewis and Clark noting what has changed and what remains the same.
